name: audit log: every entry has an `event` field naming the action (string, non-empty)
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" >/dev/null 2>&1 && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const lines=fs.readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl","utf8").trim().split("
");for(const l of lines){const j=JSON.parse(l);if(typeof j.event!=="string"||!j.event){process.stderr.write("FAIL "+l+"
");process.exit(1)}};process.stderr.write("ok
")'
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: x
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://e.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/a.yaml
